subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — I'd be glad to schedule a partnership discussion with Vendor Inc.

Regarding your request, I'm unable to share internal contact details (CTO and VP of Engineering email and phone). Please find all publicly available contact information on our website at https://company.example.com/contact.

For the meeting, I'd like to propose the following slots:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
